nasb.text: I hate your new moon festivals and your appointed feasts, They have become a burden to Me; I am weary of bearing them.

esv.text: Your new moons and your appointed feasts my soul hates; they have become a burden to me; I am weary of bearing them.

cnv.text: 你們的月朔和制定的節期，我心裡恨惡； 它們都成了我的重擔， 我已承擔得不耐煩了。

ccb.text: 我憎恶你们的朔日及其他节期， 它们成了我的重担， 令我厌倦。

csbs.text: 你们的新月节和所定的节期， 是我心里所恨恶的； 它们成了我的重负， 我已厌倦不堪。
